description:
Offline image compressor, resizer and converter.
Kompact is a privacy-first, fully offline utility for managing and processing digital images. Easily compress photos (JPEG, PNG, WebP), resize dimensions, and apply text watermarks, all without relying on cloud services.

Features:
* Smart Compression: Reduce image file sizes while maintaining high visual quality.
* Image Resizing & Conversion: Adjust dimensions and convert across popular formats (JPEG, PNG, WebP).
* Custom Text Watermarks: Add personalized, styled text overlays to images.
* 100% Offline: All image processing happens locally on the device for maximum privacy.
* Material Design: Clean interface built with Jetpack Compose, supporting dynamic theming and dark mode.

Kompact provides essential image processing tools in a lightweight, open-source package. No analytics, no network telemetry, and no advertisements.
